历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3552 → 3474 → 2917 → 2184 → 1984, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative advance of about 933 places in the last 3 years, and a baseline of about 1984 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category was 88 in 2021, 87 in 2022, 88 in 2023, 83 in 2024, and 84 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 92, an increase of about 9.5% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competition slightly.
3. [School Level] 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 15th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (16th in 2025), firmly among the top engineering powerhouses in the country.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2026 reputation document, there are no negative records for Southeast University; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 31st overall, with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.37 million), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting relatively high application attention; no obvious enrollment gaps in recent years; it has 5 A+ disciplines (Architecture, Civil Engineering, Transportation Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), and a total of 18 disciplines rated A- or above, covering popular engineering fields such as Information, Electronics, Computer Science, Control, and Mechanical Engineering, with extremely outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Artificial Intelligence continue to have high social popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province increased from about 206,000 in 2021 to about 320,000 in 2025, and to about 347,000 in 2026, increasing year by year, with a growth of about 8.4% from 2025 to 2026, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) was 405 in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years; Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, in the core area of the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal; its enrollment scale in Hunan Province is relatively large (over 80 in Physics Category), making it a 985 university with a larger cross-provincial enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 9.5% easing competition, the increase of about 8.4% in Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province intensifying competition, the extremely high school level and outstanding disciplinary strength, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity, the effects of expansion and candidate increase roughly offset each other, but the overall appeal of the school is strong. It is expected that the ranking will continue to advance slightly from the 2025 baseline of 1984; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2067, with a range of 1831–2303.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1831–2303, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science Class, Biomedical Engineering Seven-Year Bachelor-Master Program) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Wu Jianxiong Class, Electronic Information Class) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Smart Energy and Electrical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Systems) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
